author: Disney YouTube
text:
Maleficent: Costume Commentary | Notes on a Seam
Join Ellen Mirojnick, the Costume Designer behind Maleficent: Mistress of Evil, as she breaks down her dress designs for Aurora. Stream Maleficent: Mistress of Evil now on @disneyplus

author: Disney YouTube
text:
D23 Inside Disney | Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu
D23 Inside Disney goes behind the scenes of Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu! We talk with Din Djarin himself, star Pedro Pascal, and the film’s Disney Legend-ary director Jon Favreau. Plus, we’re at the world premiere with costar Sigourney Weaver, producer Dave Filoni, and more!
